name: Calisa Acquisition Corp
business: Calisa Acquisition Corp is a blank check company incorporated as a Cayman Islands exempted company for the purpose of effecting a merger, stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses or entities. As of the filing, the company has no operating revenues and has not completed any business combination. On March 6, 2026, it entered into a Business Combination Agreement to merge with Goodvision AI Inc., a Cayman Islands exempted company.

catalysts.event: Business Combination Agreement with Goodvision AI Inc.
catalysts.sentence: On March 6, 2026, we entered into an Business Combination Agreement (the BCA ) with Calisa Merger Sub, a Cayman Islands exempted company and a direct, wholly owned subsidiary of the Company ( Merger Sub ), and Goodvision AI Inc., a Cayman Islands exempted company ( Goodvision ).

catalysts.event: Deadline to complete initial business combination
catalysts.sentence: Our amended and restated memorandum and articles of association provides that we must complete our initial business combination by April 23, 2027.
